overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city waterfront in Night City from Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks across a wet plaza toward a massive futuristic building, then along a covered waterfront promenade passing neon signs and other pedestrians with umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with futuristic architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy plaza toward the large futuristic building ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking across the plaza

entered.detail: massive multi-tiered building with yellow trim and glass facades dominating the skyline
tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
large illuminated screens displaying advertisements on the building facade
wide stepped platform leading up to an elevated area on the right
tall modern lighting pole with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide rainy plaza with wet reflective pavement. The camera walks toward a massive futuristic building with yellow architectural accents and large digital billboards. Palm trees line the left side while concrete stairs ascend on the right. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk through the rain, and the atmosphere is hazy with heavy rainfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered entrance area leading to waterfront overlook

events.description: entering covered underpass area with view of waterfront opening to the right

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance while moving toward the waterfront overlook on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic police vehicle with flashing red emergency lights parked near the entrance

entered.detail: large concrete archway entrance leading under the building structure
metal safety railing along the ocean overlook becoming visible
futuristic police car with flashing red lights parked near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the building entrance, passing a police vehicle with flashing lights. The environment transitions from open plaza to a semi-covered underpass where the waterfront becomes visible on the right. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial as the camera moves under the building structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with ocean observation points

events.description: camera turns right to face the ocean and observe the water from the railing
turning back from water view to continue along the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: pausing to look out at the ocean from the railing, then continuing along the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: muscular man in tank top leaning on railing looking at his phone
person sitting on bench facing the ocean

entered.detail: choppy dark water with foggy horizon and distant structures visible
concrete benches positioned facing the waterfront for viewing
futuristic industrial structure visible through the fog on the water

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to face the open ocean, revealing a foggy waterfront view with choppy waters and distant offshore structures. People sit on observation benches or lean on the railing to view the water. The segment captures the transition from urban architecture to the natural waterfront environment before turning back toward the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon bar establishment

events.description: ambient light drops significantly as camera moves deeper under the building structure
passing bright pink neon sign of Sheesha Bar illuminating the concrete walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway passing under concrete arches and neon signage

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign reading 'Sheesha Bar' with illuminated 'OPEN' sign below
concrete tunnel-like structure with overhead linear lighting
illuminated vertical poster display with anime-style character artwork

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a darker covered walkway beneath the building, where artificial neon lighting dominates. The bright pink neon sign of the Sheesha Bar illuminates the left side of the path. The environment shifts from natural waterfront lighting to an enclosed urban space with concrete architecture and digital advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked urban plaza into a neon-lit covered promenade along a foggy waterfront. It begins by traversing a reflective pavement toward a massive futuristic building with yellow accents and digital billboards, passing pedestrians with umbrellas amidst heavy rainfall. As the camera approaches the building entrance and passes a flashing police vehicle, the open plaza transitions into a semi-covered underpass where the urban architecture begins to give way to the sea. The view then opens toward the choppy waters of a foggy ocean and distant offshore structures before turning back away from the railing. Finally, the scene shifts from the natural light of the waterfront into a darker, enclosed walkway dominated by artificial pink neon signs and digital advertisements.
